title: ARCHIVED — Speeches for 2011 — Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED — Speeches for 2011 — Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
- Speaking notes for the Honourable Jason Kenney, P.C. , M.P. Minister of Citizenship, Immigration At a News Conference on the value of Canadian citizenship [ 12 December 2011, Montreal, Quebec ]
